raw_consumer_statement: I did an online order from Best Buy and never received the product. They said a delivery person delivered it and had a picture of it on my porch. I never got a confirmation from them so I wasnt looking for it. A couple days later I realized I never received the order and called them to confirm that I never received it but they keep insisting I did. They said I still have to pay for it and have the police find it.
